Log \#10  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: For the How to Play and Mechanics Explanation section, Give it its own Icon and make it minimizable, have it as a modal that is clickable by the user in order to prompt a pop-up instead of it constantly being visible. For the theme switch section, give it its own area on the left side. For the risk board, add the icons associated with the conditions. Include a settings bar that allows the user to change the theme and volume of the game. Remove the text underneath each symbol of the reel. Universal Icons for specific case point combinations, as an example the Cherry, Diamond and Lucky 7 symbols are shared across all themes. Change the color of “Theme Slot Cabinet” so that it is more visible. Change the music based off of the given theme that is currently selected. Ensure that the theme is not 12 notes repeated constantly. 

Observations:   
**🧠 Game Logic**

* **No core gameplay changes**

---

## **🔊 Audio (Major Upgrade)**

* **Volume control added (slider \+ persistence)**  
* Audio now:  
  * Adjustable (0–100%)  
  * Saved in localStorage  
* **Richer ambient system**  
  * Uses evolving “motifs” instead of simple loops

---

## **🎰 Symbols**

* **Universal symbols added**  
  * Cherry, Diamond, Lucky 7 across all themes  
* Makes reels feel more like classic slots

---

## **🧭 UX / UI (Big Changes)**

* **Help modal added**  
  * “How to Play \+ Mechanics” popup  
  * Can open / close / minimize  
* **Settings panel added**  
  * Volume slider UI

---

## **🎨 Visual Changes**

* **Cleaner reels**  
  * Removed text labels → icons only  
* **Rules panel upgraded**  
  * Now uses icons \+ better layout  
* Minor layout polish (spacing, grid tweaks)

---

## **⚡ Net Effect**

* Adds **settings \+ help system**  
* Audio becomes **controllable \+ richer**  
* UI feels more like a **real product (not prototype)**

Validation:   
No HTML or CSS errors

Visual:   
![][image1]

Improvements: 

* Ensure that the Guide implemented at the beginning of the game can exit, or has a set timer such that if that timer is reached, the guide is closed automatically.   
  * In relation, add an additional exception error if what is causing the issue related to the Guide menu is due to some kind of error.   
* Ensure that after the initial Guide is closed, a user is able to reopen the Guide at any time if needed.   
* Have the Guide follow the layout of the current theme set for the slot machine. 

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: Change the name of the slot machine so it fits within the scheme of slot machines and not Token Furnace. Ensure that the Guide implemented at the beginning can actually be closed or has a set timer until it closes. Also, make it so you can reopen the Guide at any time by having a button somewhere on the side. Make sure the Guide follows the layout of the current theme set for the slot machine.
